====Pokémon Generations====
[[File:Hilbert PG.png|thumb|250px|Hilbert in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Hilbert briefly appeared in ''[[PG15|The King Returns]]'', where he arrived at the [[Giant Chasm]] on the back of his {{p|Zekrom}} to help [[N]] battle [[Ghetsis]] and {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Kyurem|White}} {{p|Kyurem}}.

Much like the other [[player character]]s depicted in [[Pokémon Generations]], Hilbert doesn't have any lines of dialogue.
